diagrams.title: PUE Calculation Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows how Power Usage Effectiveness is calculated as ratio of total facility energy to IT equipment energy
elements: Total Facility Energy (cooling, lighting, IT equipment)
PUE Formula: Total Facility / IT Equipment
diagrams.purpose: Understanding data center energy efficiency measurement

diagrams.title: VM Consolidation Process
diagrams.description: Illustrates the process of combining multiple underutilized VMs onto fewer physical servers
elements: Before: Multiple VMs on multiple servers with low utilization
After: Consolidated VMs on fewer servers with high utilization
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing workload consolidation for energy efficiency

diagrams.title: Three Pillars of Sustainable Cloud Computing
diagrams.description: Shows the three core pillars: Energy Efficiency, Renewable Energy, Carbon Footprint Reduction
elements: Cloud provider practices under each pillar
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the framework for sustainable cloud computing

diagrams.title: Dynamic Resource Provisioning Flow
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how cloud resources automatically scale based on demand
elements: Energy savings from optimized resource allocation
